On 04/03/2025, a fire originating at 330 Madison Avenue, 12th Floor, New York, NY 10017, owned or operated by Riverside Construction Group, spread to our insured's adjacent property at 90 State Street, Suite 700, Albany, NY 12207. The Albany Fire Department responded and confirmed the fire originated at your client's property. The fire department report (Incident No. FD-2025-81595) indicates the cause was an unattended cooking fire.
failures.actual: On 04/03/2025, a fire originating at 330 Madison Avenue, 12th Floor, New York, NY 10017, owned or operated by Riverside Construction Group, spread to our insured's adjacent property at 90 State Street, Suite 700, Albany, NY 12207. The Albany Fire Department responded and confirmed the fire originated at your client's property. The fire department report (Incident No. FD-2025-81595) indicates the cause was an unattended cooking fire. Our insured, Pamela E. Ogilvie, sustained the following damages as a result: - Structural damage to exterior wall and roof - Smoke damage throughout interior - Damaged personal property - Temporary housing costs during repairs
